M-EMAIL-TEMPLATE.NAME: Email Templates
M-EMAIL-TEMPLATE.Purpose: Render clear, branded, UTF-8-safe and transport-stable email subject and body templates for the magic-link delivery flow.

Scope.Item: Generate a meaningful subject line that explains proxy access verification
Generate HTML email with CTA button and readable structure
Generate plain-text fallback without mojibake or broken copy
Assemble binaries that remain readable after Erlang compilation and JSON encoding
Warn returning users to trust only the freshest reissued tg://proxy link after hardening rollout
Keep wording aligned with portal and verify UX

Interfaces.Interface: Returns subject, HTML, and text body for a verification email.

Risks.Risk: Broken encoding or raw placeholder strings make the email unreadable
Missing text fallback reduces deliverability or usability
Missing reissue guidance leaves stale proxy links circulating after per-SNI enforcement is enabled
